# review-prs

Review open pull requests assigned to you and cast a risk-gated decision — approve, request changes, or comment.

- **Command:** `/review-prs`
- **Schedule:** 1200s
- **Source:** shortcut
- **Required inputs:** `filter`
- **Backend:** `claude`

## Inputs

| Input | Default | Notes |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `filter` | `review-requested:@me` |  |
| `bot_marker` | `🤖` |  |
| `review_mode` | `approve` | Which verdicts the daemon may cast: approve         → full ladder: APPROVE / REQUEST_CHANGES / COMMENT request_changes → REQUEST_CHANGES on blocking findings, else COMMENT; never APPROVE comment         → always COMMENT (findings still posted inline); never APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES |
| `verbosity` | `full` | How much detail to post: full (structured body + findings table) or compact (one-liner). |
| `high_risk_globs` | `**/auth/**`, `**/*payment*`, `**/*billing*`, `**/*pricing*`, `**/*refund*`, `**/migrations/**`, `**/*.env*`, `**/*secret*`, `**/Dockerfile*`, `**/*.tf` | Diffs touching these globs are HIGH risk: never auto-approved. |

## Gate

`discover.sh` decides whether the daemon fires on a given run.

See [skill/SKILL.md](skill/SKILL.md) for the full prompt.
